title: Oxify
description: Adds Oxidizer item to the game, which oxidizes blocks made of copper.
body:
Adds **Oxidizer** item to the game, which oxidizes **blocks made of copper**.
To use the **Oxidizer** right click a **block made of copper** and it will change the oxidation state by one level. It can be enchanted with Unbreaking and Mending.
Inverse of using an axe on copper.

Crafting Recipe:  
![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/004f6223bcc5ab486036e78d200f9b37fa13042f.png)

Blocks made of copper include: All copper blocks, copper door and copper trapdoor added in Minecraft 1.21.

Dependencies:
- [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
